name: Catan
description: Trade, build and settle your way to the largest empire on the island.

name: Codenames
description: Give one-word clues to help your team find every agent before the enemy does.

name: Splendor
description: Collect gems, build your merchant empire, and outpace rival traders.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Claim railway routes across the map and connect the farthest cities first.

name: Azul
description: Draft glowing tiles to craft the most elegant palace wall in the realm.

name: Werewolf
description: Debate, bluff and vote — can the village find the wolves before dawn?

name: Chess Blitz
description: Fast-paced blitz rounds testing pure strategic depth under the clock.

name: Carcassonne
description: Lay tiles to build cities, roads and cloisters across the countryside.
